title: Education Support Executive
description:
We are looking for a responsible, patient and well-qualified Home Tutor to join our education support team and provide personalised academic assistance to students.

Position：Home Tutor / Education Support Executive

Working Hours：Monday to Friday

3:00 PM – 7:00 PM (approximately 4 hours per day)

Fixed and stable working hours

Work Location：Student's residence

Job Responsibilities (Including but not limited to) :

1.Develop customised learning plans based on each child's academic level

2.Provide tutoring support for primary school subjects (English, Mathematics, reading and homework guidance)

3.Improve students' reading comprehension, writing skills and basic numeracy

4.Accompany students during learning or enrichment activities when required

5.Provide regular feedback to parents on students' progress and performance

Job Requirements:

1.Minimum Diploma / University Degree holder

2.Strong communication and interpersonal skills

3.Patient, responsible and genuinely enjoys working with children

4.Prior tutoring or education-related experience is an advantage

5.Strong English proficiency, supported by one of the following: IELTS certificate (preferred), or Equivalent English proficiency qualifications, or English-medium education background

What We Offer:

1.Stable student assignments and working hours

2.Competitive remuneration (commensurate with experience)

3.Long-term engagement opportunities

4.Supportive and professional working environment

How to Apply:

Interested candidates are welcome to submit:

1.Resume / CV

2.Academic qualifications

3.Relevant tutoring or teaching experience (if any)

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further discussion.

postedCompany.description:
Singway Business Solutions Pte Ltd is a fast-growing business consultancy based in Singapore. We specialize in helping both local and international clients establish their presence in Singapore and grow with confidence.

Our services cover a wide spectrum, including company incorporation, immigration advisory, tax and accounting support, and real estate services. We are committed to providing practical, reliable, and client-focused solutions.

As a dynamic and forward-thinking team, we are always looking for passionate individuals who want to grow with us and make a real impact. If you're driven, adaptable, and excited to be part of a company in its scaling-up phase, we welcome you to join us on this journey.
postedCompany.name: SINGWAY BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.
